description: Manage files and permissions in Google Drive, including upload, download, listing, metadata retrieval, and sharing operations.

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload a new file to Google Drive with optional parent folder assignment.

name.description: The name to assign to the uploaded file in Google Drive.

content.description: The file content as bytes to be uploaded.

mime_type.description: The MIME type of the file (e.g., 'image/jpeg', 'application/pdf'). Auto-detected if not provided.

parents.description: List of parent folder IDs where the file should be placed in Google Drive.

id.description: The unique identifier of the uploaded file in Google Drive.

name.description: The name of the uploaded file.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the uploaded file.

size.description: The size of the uploaded file in bytes, represented as a string.

createdTime.description: The creation timestamp of the file in RFC 3339 format.

parents.description: List of parent folder IDs where the file is located in Google Drive.

tools.name: download_file
tools.description: Download a file's content and metadata from Google Drive by its file ID.

file_id.description: The unique identifier of the file to download from Google Drive.

acknowledge_abuse.description: Whether to acknowledge the abuse warning for files flagged by Google Drive (default: false).

name.description: The name of the downloaded file.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the downloaded file.

size.description: The size of the downloaded file in bytes, represented as a string.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files in Google Drive with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination.

page_size.description: Maximum number of files to return per page (default: 100).

q.description: Query string for filtering files using Google Drive query syntax (e.g., "mimeType='image/jpeg'" or "name contains 'report'").

order_by.description: Sort order for the file list (e.g., 'modifiedTime desc', 'name', 'createdTime'). Default: 'modifiedTime desc'.

id.description: The unique identifier of the file in Google Drive.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the file.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes, represented as a string.

modifiedTime.description: The last modification timestamp of the file in RFC 3339 format.

parents.description: List of parent folder IDs where the file is located in Google Drive.

files.description: Array of file objects matching the query criteria.

nextPageToken.description: Token for retrieving the next page of results in paginated queries.

incompleteSearch.description: Indicates whether the search results are incomplete due to query limitations.

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: Retrieve detailed metadata for a specific file in Google Drive.

file_id.description: The unique identifier of the file to retrieve metadata for.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of metadata fields to return (e.g., 'id,name,mimeType'). Use '*' to return all fields (default: '*').

id.description: The unique identifier of the file in Google Drive.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the file.

description.description: The user-provided description of the file.

size.description: The size of the file in bytes, represented as a string.

createdTime.description: The creation timestamp of the file in RFC 3339 format.

modifiedTime.description: The last modification timestamp of the file in RFC 3339 format.

parents.description: List of parent folder IDs where the file is located in Google Drive.

webViewLink.description: URL to view the file in the Google Drive web interface.

webContentLink.description: Direct download URL for the file content.

tools.name: create_permission
tools.description: Create a sharing permission for a file in Google Drive to grant access to users, groups, domains, or anyone.

file_id.description: The unique identifier of the file to share.

role.description: The permission role to grant: 'owner', 'organizer', 'fileOrganizer', 'writer', 'commenter', or 'reader'.

type.description: The type of grantee: 'user' (specific user), 'group' (Google Group), 'domain' (entire domain), or 'anyone' (public access).

email_address.description: The email address of the user or group to grant permission to. Required when type is 'user' or 'group'.

id.description: The unique identifier of the created permission.

role.description: The permission role that was granted.

type.description: The type of grantee for this permission.

emailAddress.description: The email address of the user or group that was granted permission.

link.description: The shareable link for the file when permission type is 'anyone'.
